name: French Sourdough Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in order listed into a large bowl.
2. Select "French" bread and press Start on your bread machine.
3. If possible, open the lid during kneading to check if the dough is too wet or dry. Adjust with a tablespoon of water or flour as needed.
4. With experience, you will know how the dough should feel after making so much bread.
